---
title: "figure-BenchmarkHeatmap"
author: "Harry Robertson"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
    code_folding: show
---

```{r setup}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width  = 18,
  fig.height = 5.5,
  dpi = 600
)

library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(funkyheatmap)

RESULTS <- "results"

N_BOOT <- 10000
SEED <- 42

source("./figure2-helpers.R")

move_column_names_bottom <- function(geom_positions, position_args,
                                     label_gap = 0.35,
                                     tick_gap = 0.12) {
  row_bottom <- min(geom_positions$row_pos$ymin, na.rm = TRUE)
  label_height <- position_args$col_annot_offset
  label_top <- row_bottom - label_gap
  label_bottom <- label_top - label_height

  text_data <- geom_positions$text_data
  if (nrow(text_data) > 0 && "angle" %in% names(text_data)) {
    is_column_name <- !is.na(text_data$angle) &
      text_data$angle == position_args$col_annot_angle &
      !is.na(text_data$ymin) &
      !is.na(text_data$ymax) &
      abs(text_data$ymin) < 1e-9 &
      abs(text_data$ymax - position_args$col_annot_offset) < 1e-9

    text_data$ymin[is_column_name] <- label_bottom
    text_data$ymax[is_column_name] <- label_top
    text_data$hjust[is_column_name] <- 1
    geom_positions$text_data <- text_data
  }

  segment_data <- geom_positions$segment_data
  if (nrow(segment_data) > 0) {
    is_column_tick <- !is.na(segment_data$y) &
      !is.na(segment_data$yend) &
      abs(segment_data$y + 0.3) < 1e-9 &
      abs(segment_data$yend + 0.1) < 1e-9

    segment_data$y[is_column_tick] <- row_bottom - tick_gap - 0.18
    segment_data$yend[is_column_tick] <- row_bottom - tick_gap
    geom_positions$segment_data <- segment_data
  }

  geom_positions$bounds <- NULL
  geom_positions
}

funky_heatmap_bottom_column_names <- function(
    data,
    column_info = NULL,
    row_info = NULL,
    column_groups = NULL,
    row_groups = NULL,
    palettes = NULL,
    legends = NULL,
    position_args = position_arguments(),
    scale_column = TRUE,
    add_abc = TRUE
) {
  verify_data <- getFromNamespace("verify_data", "funkyheatmap")
  verify_column_info <- getFromNamespace("verify_column_info", "funkyheatmap")
  verify_row_info <- getFromNamespace("verify_row_info", "funkyheatmap")
  verify_column_groups <- getFromNamespace("verify_column_groups", "funkyheatmap")
  verify_row_groups <- getFromNamespace("verify_row_groups", "funkyheatmap")
  verify_palettes <- getFromNamespace("verify_palettes", "funkyheatmap")
  verify_legends <- getFromNamespace("verify_legends", "funkyheatmap")
  calculate_geom_positions <- getFromNamespace("calculate_geom_positions", "funkyheatmap")
  compose_ggplot <- getFromNamespace("compose_ggplot", "funkyheatmap")

  data <- verify_data(data)
  column_info <- verify_column_info(column_info, data)
  row_info <- verify_row_info(row_info, data)
  column_groups <- verify_column_groups(column_groups, column_info)
  row_groups <- verify_row_groups(row_groups, row_info)
  palettes <- verify_palettes(palettes, column_info, data)
  legends <- verify_legends(legends, palettes, column_info, data)

  geom_positions <- calculate_geom_positions(
    data, column_info, row_info, column_groups, row_groups,
    palettes, position_args, scale_column, add_abc
  ) |>
    move_column_names_bottom(position_args)

  main_plot <- compose_ggplot(geom_positions, position_args)

  legend_funs <- list(
    funkyrect = getFromNamespace("create_funkyrect_legend", "funkyheatmap"),
    circle = getFromNamespace("create_circle_legend", "funkyheatmap"),
    rect = getFromNamespace("create_rect_legend", "funkyheatmap"),
    pie = getFromNamespace("create_pie_legend", "funkyheatmap"),
    text = getFromNamespace("create_text_legend", "funkyheatmap"),
    image = getFromNamespace("create_image_legend", "funkyheatmap"),
    bar = getFromNamespace("create_bar_legend", "funkyheatmap")
  )

  legend_plots <- list()
  for (legend in legends) {
    if (legend$enabled) {
      legend_fun <- legend_funs[[legend$geom]]
      legend_args <- legend
      legend_args$geom <- NULL
      legend_args$enabled <- NULL
      legend_args$palette <- NULL
      legend_args$position_args <- position_args
      legend_plots <- c(legend_plots, list(do.call(legend_fun, legend_args)))
    }
  }

  if (length(legend_plots) == 0) return(main_plot)

  legend_widths <- map_dbl(legend_plots, ~ .x$width)
  legend_heights <- map_dbl(legend_plots, ~ .x$height)
  heights <- c(main_plot$height, 0.1, max(legend_heights))
  width <- max(main_plot$width, sum(legend_widths))

  out <- patchwork::wrap_plots(
    main_plot,
    patchwork::plot_spacer(),
    patchwork::wrap_plots(legend_plots, nrow = 1, widths = legend_widths),
    ncol = 1,
    heights = heights
  )
  out$width <- width
  out$height <- sum(heights)
  out
}
```

```{r metric-specs}
RG_NLG_METRICS <- c("bleu1", "bleu2", "bleu4", "meteor", "rougel", "cider")
RG_SEM_METRICS <- c("bertscore", "semb_score", "radgraph_combined")
RG_CE_METRICS <- c("CE_precision",  "CE_recall",  "CE_f1",
                    "CE5_precision", "CE5_recall", "CE5_f1")
VQA_METRICS <- c("exact_match", "contains_match", "token_recall", "token_f1")

METRIC_LABELS <- c(
  bleu1 = "BLEU-1",
  bleu2 = "BLEU-2",
  bleu4 = "BLEU-4",
  meteor = "METEOR",
  rougel = "ROUGE-L",
  cider = "CIDEr",
  bertscore = "BERTScore",
  semb_score = "SEMB",
  radgraph_combined = "RadGraph F1",
  CE_precision = "CE14 precision",
  CE_recall = "CE14 recall",
  CE_f1 = "CE14 F1",
  CE5_precision = "CE5 precision",
  CE5_recall = "CE5 recall",
  CE5_f1 = "CE5 F1",
  exact_match = "Exact match",
  contains_match = "Contains match",
  token_recall = "Token recall",
  token_f1 = "Token F1"
)

metric_specs <- tribble(
  ~dataset,     ~task, ~family,     ~group,              ~palette,       ~metric,
  "MIMIC-CXR",  "RG",  "NLG",       "nlg_mimic",         "nlg",          list(RG_NLG_METRICS),
  "IU X-ray",   "RG",  "NLG",       "nlg_iu",            "nlg",          list(RG_NLG_METRICS),
  "MIMIC-CXR",  "RG",  "Semantic",  "semantic_mimic",    "semantic",     list(RG_SEM_METRICS),
  "IU X-ray",   "RG",  "Semantic",  "semantic_iu",       "semantic",     list(RG_SEM_METRICS),
  "MIMIC-CXR",  "RG",  "Clinical",  "clinical_mimic",    "clinical",     list(RG_CE_METRICS),
  "IU X-ray",   "RG",  "Clinical",  "clinical_iu",       "clinical",     list(RG_CE_METRICS)
) |>
  mutate(metric = map(metric, unlist)) |>
  unnest_longer(metric) |>
  group_by(dataset, task, family) |>
  mutate(
    metric_index = row_number(),
    metric_label = recode(metric, !!!METRIC_LABELS),
    column_id = paste(group, metric, sep = "__")
  ) |>
  ungroup()

data_sources <- tribble(
  ~dataset,    ~task, ~directory,
  "MIMIC-CXR", "RG",  file.path(RESULTS, "performance/rg/mimic_cxr"),
  "IU X-ray",  "RG",  file.path(RESULTS, "performance/rg/iu_xray")
)

MODALITY_LEVELS <- c("CT", "MRI", "X-Ray")
ORGAN_LEVELS <- c(
  "Abdomen", "Brain", "Brain_Face", "Brain_Tissue",
  "Chest_mediastinal", "Lung", "Neck", "Pelvic Cavity"
)
CONTENT_TYPE_LEVELS <- c(
  "Abnormality", "Color", "KG", "Modality", "Organ",
  "Plane", "Position", "Quantity", "Shape", "Size"
)
```

```{r data}
merge_model_variants <- function(per_sample) {
  per_sample |>
    mutate(
      model = if_else(
        model %in% c("internvl3_8b", "internvl3_5_8b") |
          model_label %in% c("InternVL3 8B", "InternVL3.5 8B"),
        "internvl3_8b",
        model
      ),
      model_label = if_else(
        model == "internvl3_8b",
        "InternVL3 8B",
        model_label
      )
    )
}

load_block_summary <- function(dataset_name, task_name, directory) {
  block_specs <- metric_specs |>
    filter(dataset == dataset_name, task == task_name)
  required_metrics <- unique(block_specs$metric)

  per_sample <- load_per_sample(directory) |>
    merge_model_variants()
  missing_metrics <- setdiff(required_metrics, names(per_sample))
  if (length(missing_metrics) > 0) {
    stop(
      "Missing metric columns in ", directory, ": ",
      paste(missing_metrics, collapse = ", "),
      call. = FALSE
    )
  }

  build_summary(per_sample, required_metrics) |>
    select(model_label, all_of(required_metrics)) |>
    pivot_longer(
      cols = all_of(required_metrics),
      names_to = "metric",
      values_to = "raw_value"
    ) |>
    left_join(block_specs, by = "metric") |>
    select(dataset, task, family, group, palette, metric, metric_label,
           metric_index, column_id, model_label, raw_value)
}

benchmark_long <- pmap_dfr(
  data_sources,
  \(dataset, task, directory) load_block_summary(dataset, task, directory)
)

normalise_metric <- function(x) {
  range_x <- range(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (!all(is.finite(range_x))) return(rep(NA_real_, length(x)))
  if (isTRUE(all.equal(range_x[1], range_x[2]))) return(rep(1, length(x)))
  rescale(x, to = c(0, 1), from = range_x)
}

benchmark_long <- benchmark_long |>
  group_by(dataset, task, family, metric) |>
  mutate(norm_value = normalise_metric(raw_value)) |>
  ungroup()

if (any(!is.na(benchmark_long$norm_value) &
        (benchmark_long$norm_value < 0 | benchmark_long$norm_value > 1))) {
  stop("Normalised heatmap values must be in [0, 1].", call. = FALSE)
}

model_order <- c(
  "VReason",
  "Qwen3-VL 8B",
  "Qwen2.5-VL 7B",
  "LLaMA-3.2 11B",
  "InternVL3 8B",
  "Phi-3.5 Vision",
  "Gemma-3 4B"
)

present_models <- intersect(model_order, unique(benchmark_long$model_label))
extra_models <- setdiff(unique(benchmark_long$model_label), present_models)
plot_models <- c(present_models, sort(extra_models))

plot_data <- benchmark_long |>
  select(model_label, column_id, norm_value) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = column_id, values_from = norm_value) |>
  mutate(
    overall = rowMeans(across(where(is.numeric)), na.rm = TRUE),
    id = model_label,
    row_group = if_else(model_label == "VReason", "proposed", "vlm")
  ) |>
  arrange(match(model_label, plot_models)) |>
  select(id, overall, all_of(metric_specs$column_id), row_group)

if (any(!is.finite(plot_data$overall))) {
  stop("Overall heatmap scores could not be computed.", call. = FALSE)
}

plot_matrix <- plot_data |>
  select(-row_group)
```

```{r vqa-strata-data}
pretty_stratum <- function(x) {
  str_replace_all(x, "_", " ")
}

safe_column_token <- function(x) {
  x |>
    str_replace_all("[^A-Za-z0-9]+", "_") |>
    str_replace_all("^_|_$", "") |>
    str_to_lower()
}

vqa_strata_specs <- bind_rows(
  tibble(
    stratum_type = "modality",
    stratum_type_label = "modality",
    source_col = "modality",
    stratum = MODALITY_LEVELS,
    stratum_label = MODALITY_LEVELS,
    stratum_order = seq_along(MODALITY_LEVELS)
  ),
  tibble(
    stratum_type = "location",
    stratum_type_label = "organ",
    source_col = "location",
    stratum = ORGAN_LEVELS,
    stratum_label = pretty_stratum(ORGAN_LEVELS),
    stratum_order = seq_along(ORGAN_LEVELS)
  ),
  tibble(
    stratum_type = "content_type",
    stratum_type_label = "content_type",
    source_col = "content_type",
    stratum = CONTENT_TYPE_LEVELS,
    stratum_label = CONTENT_TYPE_LEVELS,
    stratum_order = seq_along(CONTENT_TYPE_LEVELS)
  )
)

vqa_slake_ps <- load_per_sample(file.path(RESULTS, "performance/vqa/slake")) |>
  merge_model_variants()

missing_vqa_metrics <- setdiff(VQA_METRICS, names(vqa_slake_ps))
if (length(missing_vqa_metrics) > 0) {
  stop(
    "Missing VQA metric columns: ",
    paste(missing_vqa_metrics, collapse = ", "),
    call. = FALSE
  )
}

vqa_strata_long <- pmap_dfr(
  vqa_strata_specs,
  \(stratum_type, stratum_type_label, source_col,
    stratum, stratum_label, stratum_order) {
    vqa_slake_ps |>
      filter(.data[[source_col]] == stratum) |>
      select(model_label, all_of(VQA_METRICS)) |>
      pivot_longer(all_of(VQA_METRICS), names_to = "metric", values_to = "value") |>
      group_by(model_label, metric) |>
      summarise(raw_value = mean(value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
      mutate(
        stratum_type = stratum_type,
        stratum_type_label = stratum_type_label,
        stratum = stratum,
        stratum_label = stratum_label,
        stratum_order = stratum_order
      )
  }
) |>
  mutate(
    metric = factor(metric, levels = VQA_METRICS),
    metric_label = recode(as.character(metric), !!!METRIC_LABELS),
    group = paste("vqa", stratum_type, sep = "__"),
    palette = paste0("vqa_", stratum_type),
    column_id = paste(group, safe_column_token(stratum_label), sep = "__")
  ) |>
  arrange(metric, factor(stratum_type, levels = c("modality", "location", "content_type")),
          stratum_order)

vqa_strata_long <- vqa_strata_long |>
  group_by(metric, stratum_type, stratum) |>
  mutate(norm_value = normalise_metric(raw_value)) |>
  ungroup()

if (any(!is.na(vqa_strata_long$norm_value) &
        (vqa_strata_long$norm_value < 0 | vqa_strata_long$norm_value > 1))) {
  stop("Normalised VQA heatmap values must be in [0, 1].", call. = FALSE)
}

vqa_column_order <- vqa_strata_long |>
  distinct(column_id, stratum_type, stratum_order) |>
  arrange(factor(stratum_type, levels = c("modality", "location", "content_type")),
          stratum_order) |>
  pull(column_id)

vqa_plot_data <- vqa_strata_long |>
  mutate(
    metric = factor(metric, levels = VQA_METRICS),
    row_id = paste(as.character(metric), model_label, sep = "__"),
    row_group = paste0("metric__", safe_column_token(as.character(metric)))
  ) |>
  select(row_id, model_label, row_group, metric, metric_label, column_id, norm_value) |>
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = c(row_id, model_label, row_group, metric, metric_label),
    names_from = column_id,
    values_from = norm_value
  ) |>
  mutate(
    overall = rowMeans(across(all_of(vqa_column_order)), na.rm = TRUE),
    id = row_id
  ) |>
  arrange(metric, match(model_label, plot_models)) |>
  select(id, metric, metric_label, overall, all_of(vqa_column_order), row_group, model_label)

if (any(!is.finite(vqa_plot_data$overall))) {
  stop("Overall VQA heatmap scores could not be computed.", call. = FALSE)
}

vqa_plot_matrix <- vqa_plot_data |>
  select(-row_group, -metric, -metric_label)

vqa_answer_type_strata_long <- pmap_dfr(
  vqa_strata_specs,
  \(stratum_type, stratum_type_label, source_col,
    stratum, stratum_label, stratum_order) {
    vqa_slake_ps |>
      filter(
        answer_type %in% c("OPEN", "CLOSED"),
        .data[[source_col]] == stratum
      ) |>
      group_by(answer_type, model_label) |>
      summarise(raw_value = mean(token_f1, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
      mutate(
        stratum_type = stratum_type,
        stratum_type_label = stratum_type_label,
        stratum = stratum,
        stratum_label = stratum_label,
        stratum_order = stratum_order
      )
  }
) |>
  mutate(
    answer_type = factor(answer_type, levels = c("OPEN", "CLOSED")),
    answer_type_label = recode(
      as.character(answer_type),
      OPEN = "OPEN questions",
      CLOSED = "CLOSED questions"
    ),
    group = paste("vqa", stratum_type, sep = "__"),
    palette = paste0("vqa_", stratum_type),
    column_id = paste(group, safe_column_token(stratum_label), sep = "__")
  ) |>
  arrange(
    answer_type,
    factor(stratum_type, levels = c("modality", "location", "content_type")),
    stratum_order
  )

vqa_answer_type_strata_long <- vqa_answer_type_strata_long |>
  group_by(answer_type, stratum_type, stratum) |>
  mutate(norm_value = normalise_metric(raw_value)) |>
  ungroup()

if (any(!is.na(vqa_answer_type_strata_long$norm_value) &
        (vqa_answer_type_strata_long$norm_value < 0 |
         vqa_answer_type_strata_long$norm_value > 1))) {
  stop("Normalised answer-type VQA heatmap values must be in [0, 1].", call. = FALSE)
}

vqa_answer_type_column_order <- vqa_answer_type_strata_long |>
  distinct(column_id, stratum_type, stratum_order) |>
  arrange(
    factor(stratum_type, levels = c("modality", "location", "content_type")),
    stratum_order
  ) |>
  pull(column_id)

vqa_answer_type_plot_data <- vqa_answer_type_strata_long |>
  mutate(
    row_id = paste(as.character(answer_type), model_label, sep = "__"),
    row_group = paste0("answer_type__", safe_column_token(as.character(answer_type)))
  ) |>
  select(row_id, model_label, row_group, answer_type, answer_type_label,
         column_id, norm_value) |>
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = c(row_id, model_label, row_group, answer_type, answer_type_label),
    names_from = column_id,
    values_from = norm_value
  ) |>
  mutate(
    overall = rowMeans(across(all_of(vqa_answer_type_column_order)), na.rm = TRUE),
    id = row_id
  ) |>
  arrange(answer_type, match(model_label, plot_models)) |>
  select(id, answer_type, answer_type_label, overall,
         all_of(vqa_answer_type_column_order), row_group, model_label)

if (any(!is.finite(vqa_answer_type_plot_data$overall))) {
  stop("Overall answer-type VQA heatmap scores could not be computed.", call. = FALSE)
}

vqa_answer_type_plot_matrix <- vqa_answer_type_plot_data |>
  select(-row_group, -answer_type, -answer_type_label)
```

# Data Coverage

```{r coverage-table}
coverage <- data_sources |>
  mutate(per_sample = map(directory, \(x) load_per_sample(x) |> merge_model_variants())) |>
  transmute(
    dataset,
    task,
    models = map_int(per_sample, \(x) n_distinct(x$model_label)),
    examples_per_model = map_chr(
      per_sample,
      \(x) x |> count(model_label) |> pull(n) |> unique() |> sort() |> paste(collapse = ", ")
    )
  )

coverage
```

# Benchmark Summary Heatmap

```{r heatmap, fig.width=18, fig.height=5.5}
build_rg_column_info <- function(specs) {
  bind_rows(
    tibble(
      id = "id",
      group = "model",
      name = "",
      geom = "text",
      palette = NA_character_,
      width = 4.4,
      legend = FALSE,
      hjust = 0
    ),
    tibble(
      id = "overall",
      group = "overall",
      name = "Overall",
      geom = "bar",
      palette = "overall",
      width = 2.2,
      legend = TRUE,
      hjust = 0
    ),
    specs |>
      transmute(
        id = column_id,
        group,
        name = metric_label,
        geom = "circle",
        palette,
        width = 1,
        legend = FALSE,
        hjust = NA_real_
      )
  )
}

build_rg_column_groups <- function(specs) {
  bind_rows(
    tibble(
      group = c("model", "overall"),
      level1 = c("", "Overall"),
      level2 = c("", "Relative score"),
      palette = c(NA_character_, "overall")
    ),
    specs |>
      distinct(dataset, task, family, group, palette) |>
      transmute(
        group,
        level1 = family,
        level2 = dataset,
        palette
      )
  )
}

column_info <- build_rg_column_info(metric_specs)
column_groups <- build_rg_column_groups(metric_specs)

row_info <- plot_data |>
  transmute(id, group = NA_character_)

palettes <- list(
  overall = c("#F7F7F7", "#8B1A1A"),
  nlg = c("#F7FBFF", "#6BAED6", "#08519C"),
  semantic = c("#F7FCF5", "#74C476", "#006D2C"),
  clinical = c("#FFF7EC", "#FDBB84", "#A63603")
)

legends <- list(
  relative_score = list(
    palette = "overall",
    geom = "bar",
    title = "Relative score",
    labels = c("Low", "High"),
    size = 1,
    color = c("#F7F7F7", "#8B1A1A")
  ),
  nlg = list(palette = "nlg", enabled = FALSE),
  semantic = list(palette = "semantic", enabled = FALSE),
  clinical = list(palette = "clinical", enabled = FALSE)
)

benchmark_heatmap <- funky_heatmap_bottom_column_names(
  data = plot_matrix,
  column_info = column_info,
  column_groups = column_groups,
  row_info = row_info,
  row_groups = NULL,
  palettes = palettes,
  legends = legends,
  scale_column = FALSE,
  add_abc = FALSE,
  position_args = position_arguments(
    row_height = 0.85,
    row_space = 0.08,
    row_bigspace = 0.55,
    col_width = 0.92,
    col_space = 0.06,
    col_bigspace = 0.35,
    col_annot_offset = 2.8,
    col_annot_angle = 45,
    expand_ymin = 1.2,
    expand_xmax = 2.8,
    expand_ymax = 0.4
  )
)

benchmark_heatmap

mimic_metric_specs <- metric_specs |>
  filter(dataset == "MIMIC-CXR")

mimic_plot_matrix <- plot_data |>
  select(id, all_of(mimic_metric_specs$column_id)) |>
  mutate(
    overall = rowMeans(across(all_of(mimic_metric_specs$column_id)), na.rm = TRUE),
    .after = id
  )

if (any(!is.finite(mimic_plot_matrix$overall))) {
  stop("MIMIC-CXR-only overall heatmap scores could not be computed.", call. = FALSE)
}

mimic_row_info <- mimic_plot_matrix |>
  transmute(id, group = NA_character_)

mimic_benchmark_heatmap <- funky_heatmap_bottom_column_names(
  data = mimic_plot_matrix,
  column_info = build_rg_column_info(mimic_metric_specs),
  column_groups = build_rg_column_groups(mimic_metric_specs),
  row_info = mimic_row_info,
  row_groups = NULL,
  palettes = palettes,
  legends = legends,
  scale_column = FALSE,
  add_abc = FALSE,
  position_args = position_arguments(
    row_height = 0.85,
    row_space = 0.08,
    row_bigspace = 0.55,
    col_width = 0.92,
    col_space = 0.06,
    col_bigspace = 0.35,
    col_annot_offset = 2.8,
    col_annot_angle = 45,
    expand_ymin = 1.2,
    expand_xmax = 2.8,
    expand_ymax = 0.4
  )
)

mimic_benchmark_heatmap
```

# SLAKE VQA Strata Heatmap

```{r vqa-coverage-table}
vqa_coverage <- vqa_slake_ps |>
  summarise(
    models = n_distinct(model_label),
    examples_per_model = paste(sort(unique(count(vqa_slake_ps, model_label)$n)), collapse = ", "),
    modalities = n_distinct(modality),
    organs = n_distinct(location),
    content_types = n_distinct(content_type)
  )

vqa_coverage
```

```{r vqa-strata-heatmap, fig.width=14, fig.height=14.5}
vqa_column_info <- bind_rows(
  tibble(
    id = "model_label",
    group = "model",
    name = "Model",
    geom = "text",
    palette = NA_character_,
    width = 4.2,
    legend = FALSE,
    hjust = 0
  ),
  tibble(
    id = "overall",
    group = "overall",
    name = "Overall",
    geom = "bar",
    palette = "overall",
    width = 2.2,
    legend = TRUE,
    hjust = 0
  ),
  vqa_strata_long |>
    distinct(column_id, group, stratum_label, palette, stratum_type, stratum_order) |>
    arrange(factor(stratum_type, levels = c("modality", "location", "content_type")),
            stratum_order) |>
    transmute(
      id = column_id,
      group,
      name = stratum_label,
      geom = "circle",
      palette,
      width = 0.9,
      legend = FALSE,
      hjust = NA_real_
    )
)

vqa_column_groups <- bind_rows(
  tibble(
    group = c("model", "overall"),
    level1 = c("Model", "Overall"),
    level2 = c("", "Relative score"),
    palette = c(NA_character_, "overall")
  ),
  vqa_strata_long |>
    distinct(stratum_type, stratum_type_label, group, palette) |>
    arrange(factor(stratum_type, levels = c("modality", "location", "content_type"))) |>
    transmute(
      group,
      level1 = stratum_type_label,
      level2 = "",
      palette
    )
)

vqa_row_info <- vqa_plot_data |>
  transmute(id, group = row_group)

vqa_row_groups <- vqa_plot_data |>
  distinct(group = row_group, metric, metric_label) |>
  arrange(metric) |>
  transmute(group, level1 = metric_label)

vqa_palettes <- list(
  overall = c("#FAF5FF", "#7E22CE"),
  vqa_modality = c("#F5F3FF", "#A78BFA", "#5B21B6"),
  vqa_location = c("#ECFEFF", "#22D3EE", "#0E7490"),
  vqa_content_type = c("#FDF2F8", "#F472B6", "#BE185D")
)

vqa_legends <- list(
  relative_score = list(
    palette = "overall",
    geom = "bar",
    title = "Relative score",
    labels = c("Low", "High"),
    size = 1,
    color = c("#FAF5FF", "#7E22CE")
  ),
  vqa_modality = list(palette = "vqa_modality", enabled = FALSE),
  vqa_location = list(palette = "vqa_location", enabled = FALSE),
  vqa_content_type = list(palette = "vqa_content_type", enabled = FALSE)
)

vqa_strata_heatmap <- funky_heatmap_bottom_column_names(
  data = vqa_plot_matrix,
  column_info = vqa_column_info,
  column_groups = vqa_column_groups,
  row_info = vqa_row_info,
  row_groups = vqa_row_groups,
  palettes = vqa_palettes,
  legends = vqa_legends,
  scale_column = FALSE,
  add_abc = FALSE,
  position_args = position_arguments(
    row_height = 0.58,
    row_space = 0.03,
    row_bigspace = 0.32,
    col_width = 0.82,
    col_space = 0.05,
    col_bigspace = 0.34,
    col_annot_offset = 3.1,
    col_annot_angle = 45,
    expand_ymin = 0.8,
    expand_xmax = 3.2,
    expand_ymax = 0.4
  )
)

vqa_strata_heatmap
```

# SLAKE VQA Token F1 Strata Heatmap by Answer Type

```{r vqa-answer-type-strata-heatmap, fig.width=14, fig.height=8.6}
vqa_answer_type_column_info <- bind_rows(
  tibble(
    id = "model_label",
    group = "model",
    name = "Model",
    geom = "text",
    palette = NA_character_,
    width = 4.2,
    legend = FALSE,
    hjust = 0
  ),
  tibble(
    id = "overall",
    group = "overall",
    name = "Overall",
    geom = "bar",
    palette = "overall",
    width = 2.2,
    legend = TRUE,
    hjust = 0
  ),
  vqa_answer_type_strata_long |>
    distinct(
      column_id, group, stratum_label, palette, stratum_type, stratum_order
    ) |>
    arrange(
      factor(stratum_type, levels = c("modality", "location", "content_type")),
      stratum_order
    ) |>
    transmute(
      id = column_id,
      group,
      name = stratum_label,
      geom = "circle",
      palette,
      width = 0.72,
      legend = FALSE,
      hjust = NA_real_
    )
)

vqa_answer_type_column_groups <- bind_rows(
  tibble(
    group = c("model", "overall"),
    level1 = c("Model", "Overall"),
    level2 = c("", "Relative score"),
    palette = c(NA_character_, "overall")
  ),
  vqa_answer_type_strata_long |>
    distinct(stratum_type, stratum_type_label, group, palette) |>
    arrange(factor(stratum_type, levels = c("modality", "location", "content_type"))) |>
    transmute(
      group,
      level1 = stratum_type_label,
      level2 = "",
      palette
    )
)

vqa_answer_type_row_info <- vqa_answer_type_plot_data |>
  transmute(id, group = row_group)

vqa_answer_type_row_groups <- vqa_answer_type_plot_data |>
  distinct(group = row_group, answer_type, answer_type_label) |>
  arrange(answer_type) |>
  transmute(group, level1 = answer_type_label)

vqa_answer_type_strata_heatmap <- funky_heatmap_bottom_column_names(
  data = vqa_answer_type_plot_matrix,
  column_info = vqa_answer_type_column_info,
  column_groups = vqa_answer_type_column_groups,
  row_info = vqa_answer_type_row_info,
  row_groups = vqa_answer_type_row_groups,
  palettes = vqa_palettes,
  legends = vqa_legends,
  scale_column = FALSE,
  add_abc = FALSE,
  position_args = position_arguments(
    row_height = 0.66,
    row_space = 0.04,
    row_bigspace = 0.55,
    col_width = 0.82,
    col_space = 0.05,
    col_bigspace = 0.34,
    col_annot_offset = 3.1,
    col_annot_angle = 45,
    expand_ymin = 0.8,
    expand_xmax = 3.2,
    expand_ymax = 0.4
  )
)

vqa_answer_type_strata_heatmap
```
